title: 12 Settlement of Trace Request Adjustments and Service Charges
body_text:
12	Settlement of Trace Request Adjustments and Service Charges
12.1	Settlement of Adjustments and Service Charges
Use the ГўВҖВңClosed-SettledГўВҖВқ report to reconcile the transactions to the postings on Current Account Services (CAS) Online. See Chapter 10, OLT Reports, for additional information.
Settlement with the Financial Institution
Settlement for electronic bill payment trace request adjustments and service charges is posted on the date the status of the trace request changes to ГўВҖВңClosed ГўВҖВ“ SettledГўВҖВқ. Use the OLT reports function to obtain a daily list of ГўВҖВңClosed ГўВҖВ“ SettledГўВҖВқ trace requests. The report provides the adjustment amount, the service charge amount, and the transit number to which settlement is posted.
Settlement is posted to the financial institutionГўВҖВҷs account with its central credit union. Specifically, settlement is posted to the branch associated with the trace request or to the transit number specified by the financial institution.
To change the transit number to which settlement is posted, contact Central 1, Client Support Services.
Settlement with the Member
After the daily OLT report of ГўВҖВңClosed ГўВҖВ“ SettledГўВҖВқ trace requests is generated, review each trace request to determine if settlement with the member is required. Read the Additional Comments section to obtain any information from Central 1 or the biller.
If settlement with the member is required, post the adjustment amount and/or the service charge to the memberГўВҖВҷs account.
END
